root_text.an3.6:1.3: Akusalena kāyakammena, akusalena vacīkammena, akusalena manokammena.
root_text.an3.6:1.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhi dhammehi samannāgato bālo veditabbo.
root_text.an3.6:2.1: Tīhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato paṇḍito veditabbo.
root_text.an3.6:2.3: Kusalena kāyakammena, kusalena vacīkammena, kusalena manokammena.
root_text.an3.6:2.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhi dhammehi samannāgato paṇḍito veditabbo.

translation_text.an3.6:1.1: “A fool is known by three things.
translation_text.an3.6:1.3: Unskillful deeds by way of body, speech, and mind.
translation_text.an3.6:1.4: These are the three things by which a fool is known.
translation_text.an3.6:2.1: An astute person is known by three things.
translation_text.an3.6:2.3: Skillful deeds by way of body, speech, and mind.
translation_text.an3.6:2.4: These are the three things by which an astute person is known.
